summary.business_type: Music Discovery SaaS — Underground Electronic Live Sets Platform
top_findings: No robots.txt file (404) — search engines crawling blind
No canonical tags on any page — duplicate content risk
No Open Graph or Twitter Card tags on most pages
Auth pages (/login, /register) publicly indexable with no noindex
quick_wins: Add robots.txt with sitemap pointer (< 1 hour)
Generate sitemap.xml via Next.js app/sitemap.ts (< 2 hours)
Add canonical tags to layout.tsx (< 1 hour)
Add noindex to /login and /register pages (< 30 min)
Add Open Graph tags to homepage and static pages (< 2 hours)

categories.name: Technical SEO
what_works: HTTPS enforced site-wide
HSTS header present (max-age=63072000)
HTML lang attribute set to 'en'
Vercel CDN caching working (HIT responses)
favicon.ico present and accessible
Mobile viewport meta tag present
Server returns correct HTTP status codes

findings.title: robots.txt missing (404)
findings.description: GET /robots.txt returns 404. Search engine crawlers have no guidance on which pages to crawl or avoid. This also means no sitemap pointer for Googlebot.
findings.recommendation: Create public/robots.txt with: User-agent: * / Allow: / / Sitemap: https://www.senssetify.com/sitemap.xml

findings.title: sitemap.xml missing (404)
findings.description: GET /sitemap.xml returns 404. Google has no indexation roadmap. Public pages (/login, /register, /search, future public set pages) are undiscoverable.
findings.recommendation: Create app/sitemap.ts in Next.js 14 App Router to auto-generate sitemap. Include: /, /login, /register, /search, and dynamic /sets/[id] pages with status=READY.

findings.title: No canonical tags
findings.description: No <link rel='canonical'> detected on homepage, /login, /search, or other pages. Risk of duplicate content if pages are accessible via multiple URLs (www vs non-www, trailing slash variants).
findings.recommendation: Add canonical to root layout.tsx using Next.js metadata API: metadata.alternates.canonical = '/' and per-page overrides.

findings.title: Auth pages publicly indexable
findings.description: /login and /register return 200 with no noindex directive. These pages consume crawl budget and may appear in search results with low-value content.
findings.recommendation: Add export const metadata = { robots: { index: false } } to app/(auth)/login/page.tsx and app/(auth)/register/page.tsx.

findings.title: Duplicate title tags across all pages
findings.description: Every page (homepage, /login, /search, /register) shares the same title 'Senssetify — Music is a Journey'. Google treats this as a low-quality signal and may rewrite titles.
findings.recommendation: Add unique titles per route via generateMetadata. Pattern: '[Page Name] | Senssetify' for static pages, dynamic titles for set/profile pages.

findings.title: No security headers (CSP, X-Frame-Options)
findings.description: Content-Security-Policy and X-Frame-Options headers not detected. HSTS is present. Missing headers are a minor ranking signal and a security concern.
findings.recommendation: Add security headers in next.config.mjs headers() function.

categories.name: Content Quality
what_works: Homepage copy is emotionally resonant and differentiated ('How do you feel right now?')
Mood category descriptions are human and specific ('Time suspends', 'Chest opens', 'Gravity fades')
Meta description on homepage is present and compelling
Brand tagline 'Music is a Journey' is consistent

findings.title: Most content behind authentication wall
findings.description: Set detail pages (/sets/[id]), profile pages (/profile/[username]) appear to require Clerk authentication. Googlebot cannot crawl and index this content, severely limiting organic discovery of individual sets and artists.
findings.recommendation: Make set detail pages (/sets/[id]) and profile pages publicly accessible without login. This is the most impactful SEO improvement for organic reach. Guard only upload/like/follow actions.

findings.title: No meta descriptions on /login, /search, /register
findings.description: Secondary pages have no unique meta description. Google will auto-generate one from page content, which is often low quality for auth pages.
findings.recommendation: Add per-page metadata with description to each route's generateMetadata or static metadata export.

findings.title: No blog or editorial content
findings.description: Zero editorial content (artist interviews, genre guides, mood explanations). This limits long-tail keyword acquisition and E-E-A-T signals.
findings.recommendation: Phase 6+ consideration: add a /blog or /discover section with mood guides and artist spotlights.

categories.name: On-Page SEO
what_works: H1 on homepage ('How do you feel right now?') is unique and keyword-relevant
Homepage meta description present and high quality
Heading hierarchy present on homepage (H1 → H2)

findings.title: Homepage missing Open Graph tags
findings.description: No og:title, og:description, og:image, og:type, or og:url detected on homepage. Social shares (Twitter/X, Discord, WhatsApp) will show unstyled link previews.
findings.recommendation: Add to root layout.tsx metadata: openGraph: { title, description, url, siteName, type: 'website', images: [{ url: '/og-image.jpg', width: 1200, height: 630 }] }

findings.title: No Twitter Card tags
findings.description: No twitter:card, twitter:title, or twitter:image tags. Twitter/X link previews will be text-only.
findings.recommendation: Add twitter: { card: 'summary_large_image', title, description, images } to layout metadata.

findings.title: /search page has no unique title or meta
findings.description: Search page inherits the root layout title/description. Not indexable for search-intent keywords.
findings.recommendation: Add metadata export: title: 'Search Live Sets | Senssetify', description: 'Search thousands of live DJ sets by mood, artist, or genre.'

findings.title: No structured data anywhere
findings.description: Zero JSON-LD schema detected on any page. Missing: WebSite schema (homepage, enables sitelinks search box), MusicRecording/CreativeWork for set pages, Person schema for artist profiles.
findings.recommendation: Add WebSite schema to layout.tsx. Add MusicRecording or CreativeWork schema to /sets/[id] generateMetadata. Add Person schema to /profile/[username].

findings.title: No BreadcrumbList schema
findings.description: Set detail and profile pages have no breadcrumb schema. Breadcrumbs improve SERP display.
findings.recommendation: Add BreadcrumbList JSON-LD to set and profile pages.

categories.name: Performance (Core Web Vitals)
what_works: Vercel CDN global edge network — low TTFB from Frankfurt (Age headers confirm edge caching)
Next.js 14 App Router with SSR/SSG — pages pre-rendered
Static asset caching (CSS, fonts, JS chunks)
Font preloading with rel=preload for WOFF/WOFF2
Image optimization via Next.js Image component where used

findings.title: Large JS bundle with many async chunks
findings.description: Homepage HTML loads 10+ async JavaScript chunks including Clerk (clerk.browser.js external CDN load). Clerk JS is ~250KB and loaded cross-origin, potentially delaying interactivity.
findings.recommendation: Verify Clerk JS loads async (it does — async attribute present). Consider lazy-loading UserButton component. Run Lighthouse to confirm actual INP/TBT impact.

findings.title: No explicit Cache-Control for immutable assets
findings.description: Cache-Control: public, max-age=0, must-revalidate on HTML responses (correct). Verify /_next/static/* assets have long max-age (Next.js handles this automatically with content hashing).
findings.recommendation: Run Lighthouse or WebPageTest to confirm static asset caching. This is likely handled correctly by Vercel + Next.js.

categories.name: AI Search Readiness
what_works: Clear brand identity and unique value proposition
Mood-based discovery concept is novel and citable

findings.title: No llms.txt file
findings.description: No /llms.txt found. AI crawlers (Claude, ChatGPT, Perplexity) have no structured guidance on site content and indexation preferences.
findings.recommendation: Create public/llms.txt with site description, key sections, and content access policy.

findings.title: No AI-citable public content
findings.description: Content discovery pages (/sets/[id], /profile/[username]) appear to redirect to login for unauthenticated users. AI crawlers cannot index set or artist content.
findings.recommendation: Same as Content Quality finding — make set and profile pages publicly accessible. This is the single highest-leverage SEO action.

categories.name: Images
what_works: favicon.ico present (200 OK)
Next.js Image component used for cover art (with width/height optimization)

findings.title: No OG image for social sharing
findings.description: No og:image tag on any page. Social shares show blank preview images. This significantly reduces click-through from Discord, Twitter/X, and WhatsApp shares.
findings.recommendation: Create a static /og-image.jpg (1200×630) for the homepage. For /sets/[id] pages, generate dynamic OG images using Next.js @vercel/og or use set cover art URL.

findings.title: No apple-touch-icon
findings.description: No apple-touch-icon link tag detected. iOS home screen saves and PWA installs show blank icons.
findings.recommendation: Add 180×180 apple-touch-icon to public/ and reference in layout metadata.

phases.name: Phase 1: Critical Fixes
items: Create public/robots.txt (30 min)
Create app/sitemap.ts — Next.js dynamic sitemap (2 hours)
Add noindex to /login and /register pages (30 min)
Add canonical link to root layout.tsx metadata (30 min)
Make /sets/[id] and /profile/[username] publicly accessible without auth (2-3 hours — HIGHEST IMPACT)

phases.name: Phase 2: High-Impact Improvements
items: Add Open Graph + Twitter Card tags to root layout.tsx
Create static OG image (1200×630) for homepage social sharing
Add unique title + meta description to each route (login, register, search, upload, profile, set)
Add WebSite JSON-LD schema to homepage
Add MusicRecording/CreativeWork schema to /sets/[id]
Add Person schema to /profile/[username]

phases.name: Phase 3: Analytics & Authority
items: Install Plausible or Umami analytics (Phase 6 item)
Submit sitemap.xml to Google Search Console
Create /llms.txt for AI crawler guidance
Add apple-touch-icon and PWA manifest
Add security headers (CSP, X-Frame-Options) to next.config.mjs
Set up dynamic OG images for set pages via @vercel/og

phases.name: Phase 4: Content & Long-tail
items: Create mood landing pages (/mood/hypnotic, /mood/euphoric etc.) as publicly indexable SEO entry points
Add BreadcrumbList schema to set and profile pages
Consider /discover or /blog for editorial content (artist spotlights, genre guides)
Monitor Core Web Vitals via GSC after indexation
